tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes. Creatinine is elevated, indicating possible reduced kidney function. Carbon dioxide is slightly low, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and glycemic control.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
